### 2. Checkstyleз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҸӮеӣҰж¬ў (`checkstyle-rules.xml`)

**йҚ”зҶ»е…ҳ**: Maven CheckstyleйҺ»жҺҚж¬ўйҗЁеӢҜеҺӨзјғоҶҪжһғжө и®№зҙқйҗўг„Өз°¬жө пҪҮзҲңз’җг„©еҷәеҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢ?

**й—Ҷе—ҳеһҡйҚ’зҷ•aven**:
йҚҰв•ңpom.xml`ж¶“о…ҹеқҠйҚ”зҠұдә’ж¶“е¬®еҺӨзјғоҮҶзҙ°

```xml
<plugin>
    <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
    <artifactId>maven-checkstyle-plugin</artifactId>
    <version>3.2.1</version>
    <configuration>
        <configLocation>scripts/checkstyle-rules.xml</configLocation>
        <encoding>UTF-8</encoding>
        <consoleOutput>true</consoleOutput>
        <failsOnError>true</failsOnError>
    </configuration>
    <executions>
        <execution>
            <id>validate</id>
            <phase>validate</phase>
            <goals>
                <goal>check</goal>
            </goals>
        </execution>
    </executions>
</plugin>
```

**жөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҸӮи§„зЎ¶**:
```bash

mvn checkstyle:check

# йҗўзҶёеһҡйҺ¶гғҘжҶЎ
mvn checkstyle:checkstyle
```

Initialized the repo context.

This is a Java 21 Maven project for a JMix config/constraint engine. Main areas:
- `src/main/java/com/jmix/executor`: business/config models, constraint executor, OR-Tools alg model, utilities.
- `src/main/java/com/jmix/tool`: generators, packers, compiler/runner helpers, annotation builders, LLM-related tooling.
- `src/main/resources/cengine`: FreeMarker template and prompt/model config.
- `src/test/java`: broad JUnit 5 scenario, optimizer, artifact generation, utility, and executor tests.

Useful commands:
- `mvn test`
- `mvn test -Dtest=FilterExpressionExecutorTest`
- `mvn clean compile`

Note: the worktree already has many modified/untracked `.specstory` files. IвҖҷll leave those alone unless you explicitly ask me to touch them.

# RFC-0001: йҚ©иҪ°з°¬й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«йҗЁеӢ«е–…з»ӣж «з“ҘйҗЈгғҜзҙҷйҺјж»…еӮЁз»ӣж «жҡҗй”ӣ?

> йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҫҠзҙ°й‘ҪеӨӢо”Қй”ӣең–raftй”ӣ?
> йҸғгғҰж№Ўй”ӣ?026-04-24

---

## 1. йҺҪжЁҝоӣҰ

йҸҲзҗ‘FCйҺ»ж„ҜоҶ…йҚҰг„ҰДҒйҚ§жҘ…еҺӨзјғоҶҝз·ӯйҚҸгғӨи…‘йҸӮжқҝо–ғ**йҚҗеҙҮз“Ҙз»ӣж «жҡҗ**й”ӣең–ecision Strategyй”ӣеӨҠеј¬йҸҒеё®зҙқйҚҸдҪҪоҶҸйҗўг„ҰеҹӣйҺёеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«з»ҳеҜҡзҖ№ж°¬еҪүй–Іеҝ“еһҺйҸҖоҲңж®‘жөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСғжӢ°йҺәжҺ‘з°ӯйҸӮз‘°зҙЎйҠҶеӮқоҮҡйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳйҚҷоҲңвҖҳж·ҮжҝҶж№Әжҫ¶ж°іР’йҸӢж°«еҰҮйҸғи®№зҙқжөјжЁәеҺӣжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–з»—п№ҖжӮҺж¶“ж°¬е§ҹйҚӢеҝ“гӮҪйҗЁеӢ«еҪІзҗӣеІғР’й”ӣе қоӣ§жө й”ӢзүёйҸҲвӮ¬жөЈеәӨР’й”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬?

## 2. йҚ”г„ҰжәҖ

### 2.1 й—ӮоҮҖо•Ҫй‘іеұҫж«ҷ

иӨ°ж’іеў з»ҫпёҪжҪ«е§№еӮқР’йҚЈг„Ҙж№ӘйҸӢж°«еҰҮжҫ¶ж°іР’йҸғи®№зҙқйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢ«еһҺйҸҖоҲһгҖҺжҗҙеҝ•ж•ұе§№еӮқР’йҚЈг„Ҙе”ҙй–®г„§з•»еЁүжӣһе–…зҖ№ж°ҫзҙқжқҲж’іеҡӯжӨӨе“„з°ӯж¶“е¶…еҪІйҺәСҒвӮ¬еӮҷз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°

**йҚҰзғҳж«ҷ**й”ӣж°ұж•ёй‘ҙжҲҰеҺӨзјғ?
- CPU й–«еӨҗгҖҚй”ӣж¬іPU1й”ӣеҹӘ?0й”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬дёҶPU2й”ӣеҹӘ?й”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬дёҶPU3й”ӣеҹӘ?00й”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬дёҶPU4й”ӣеҹӘ?0й”ӣеӨҲвӮ¬дёҶPU5й”ӣеҹӘ?00й”ӣ?
- Disk й–«еӨҗгҖҚй”ӣж¬ҙisk1йҠҶдёҸisk2йҠҶдёҸisk3...

иӨ°ж’¶ж•ӨйҺҙз–ҜоӣҰе§№еӮӣзҒҮж¶“жғ§еў 20ж¶“оҒ„еҪІзҗӣеІғР’йҸғи®№зҙқйҗўеҸҳз°¬йҚ’е—ҳж•®жӨӨе“„з°ӯж¶“е¶ҮвҖҳзҖ№ж°ҫзҙқйҸҲвӮ¬жөјжЁҝР’й”ӣең•PU2й”ӣеұјзҺҜйҸҚе…јжё¶жөЈеәҜзҙҡйҚҷоҲқе…ҳйҺәжҺ‘ж№Әз»—?0жөЈе¶„з®ЈйҚҡеәҜзҙқзҖөиү°еҡ§йҗўг„ҰеҹӣйҸғзҠізЎ¶й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҸҲзҶёж№ңйҗЁеӢӯзІЁйҸӢжәҝвӮ¬?

### 2.2 йҗўг„Ұеҹӣз’ҮеӨӢзң°

йҗўг„Ұеҹӣз”Ҝеұҫж№ңй‘іиҠҘеҜңй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«йҺёеӣ§з•ҫйҺјж»…еӮЁз»ӣж «жҡҗй”ӣеұјз·ҘжҝЎеӮҰзҙ°
- йҺёеӣ§з•ҫ CPU йҚ’е—ҷиў«йҺё?**жө й”ӢзүёйҚ—еӣ§з°ӯ** йҺјж»…еӮЁ
- йҺёеӣ§з•ҫ Disk йҚ’е—ҷиў«йҺё?**жө й”Ӣзүёй—„е¶…з°ӯ** йҺјж»…еӮЁ

жқ©ж¬җзүұйҚҷоҲҷдә’зәӯоҶ»з№ҡйҚҰг„Ұж№Ғй—„ж„®ж®‘з‘ҷпҪҮв”–й—Ӯжқ‘е”ҙй”ӣеұјзҙӯйҚҸе Јз№‘йҚҘзӮ°зҺҜйҸҚе…јжё¶жөјжЁјж®‘зјҒеӢ«жӮҺйҠҶ?

### 2.3 ж¶“ж°ұжҷ«йҚҷеӮқвӮ¬?

Google OR-Tools CP-SAT йҺ»ж„Әз·өжөң?`addDecisionStrategy()` APIй”ӣеұҫж•®йҺёдҪ№еҜңйҺёеӣ§з•ҫжӨӨе“„з°ӯйҚңеІҖз“ҘйҗЈгғҘоҳ©йҗһе——еҪүй–Іеҝ•зІҚй”ӣ?

```java
// йҚҸе қоҳ©йҗһ?CPU йҚҷж©Җеҷә
model.addDecisionStrategy(cpuVars,
    DecisionStrategyProto.VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST,
    DecisionStrategyProto.DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MIN_VALUE);

// йҚҗе¶…оҳ©йҗһ?Disk йҚҷж©Җеҷә
model.addDecisionStrategy(diskVars,
    DecisionStrategyProto.VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST,
    DecisionStrategyProto.DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE);
```

## 3. з’ҒжҚҗо…ёйҸӮи§„о”Қ

### 3.1 йҸҚзЁҝзёҫе§’еӮҡеә·

#### 3.1.1 йҚҗеҙҮз“Ҙз»ӣж «жҡҗй”ӣең–ecisionStrategyй”ӣ?

йҚҗеҙҮз“Ҙз»ӣж «жҡҗйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲжө гғӨз¬…зјҒжқ‘е®ій”ӣ?

| зјҒжқ‘е®і | й–«еӨҗгҖҚ | з’Үеӯҳж§‘ |
|------|------|------|
| **з»ӣж «жҡҗз»«иҜІзҖ·** | `UNSPECIFIED` | ж¶“е¶ҶеҜҡзҖ№ж°ҫзҙқжөЈи·Ёж•ӨжҰӣжЁҝо…»зҗӣеұјиҙҹ |
| | `ASCENDING` | йҚ—еӣ§з°ӯйҺәжҺ‘еһӘй”ӣең«ELECT_MIN_VALUEй”ӣ?|
| | `DESCENDING` | й—„е¶…з°ӯйҺәжҺ‘еһӘй”ӣең«ELECT_MAX_VALUEй”ӣ?|
| **йҺәжҺ‘з°ӯзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?* | зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СӮе”¬йҗ®?| йҚ©иҪ°з°¬йҚқоҒғйҮңзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҶз№ҳзҗӣеұҫеё“жҗҙ?|

> **йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”йҺәжҺ‘з°ӯйҗЁеӢ«зқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁ?*й”ӣ?
> - Part йҗЁеӢ«зҶҖзәӯвӮ¬йҸҒеӯҳжҡҹзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҚзҙҷжҝЎ?`price`йҠҶд№Јquantity`й”ӣ?
> - Part йҗЁ?`dynAttrs` йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬СҚзҙҷй—ҮвӮ¬ж¶“зғҳжҡЈйҸҒжү®иў«йҚЁе¬¶зҙҡ

#### 3.1.2 йҚҗеҙҮз“Ҙз»ӣж «жҡҗй–°е¶Үз–Ҷй”ӣең«trategyConfigй”ӣ?

```java
public class StrategyConfig {
    /** з»ӣж «жҡҗз»«иҜІзҖ·й”ӣж¬°SCENDING / DESCENDING / UNSPECIFIED */
    private StrategyType strategyType;

    /** йҺәжҺ‘з°ӯзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СӮе”¬йҗ®дҫҠзҙҷжҝЎ?"price"йҠҶ?capacity"йҠҶ?speed"й”ӣ?*/
    private String sortAttributeCode;
}

public enum StrategyType {
    UNSPECIFIED,  // ж¶“е¶ҶеҜҡзҖ№ж°ҫзҙқжөЈи·Ёж•ӨжҰӣжЁҝо…»зҗӣеұјиҙҹ
    ASCENDING,     // йҚ—еӣ§з°ӯ
    DESCENDING     // й—„е¶…з°ӯ
}
```

```
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrParaType;

import lombok.Data;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з’Үй”Ӣзң°
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬зҖ№ж°«з®ҹй–®г„Өж¬ўйҸҢгғЁоҮ—йҗЁеӢӯе®ійҸүзҶёжҪҜжө ?
 *
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
@Data
public class PartConstraintReq {
    /**
     * зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬С…иў«йҚЁ?
     */
    private AttrParaType attrType = AttrParaType.Sum;

    /**
     * зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СӮе”¬йҗ®?

    /**
     * зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬С„зҳ®жқҲеҶӘоғҒ
     */
    private String attrComparator;

    /**
     * зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СғвӮ¬?
     */
    private String attrValue;

    /**
     * зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҶз№ғе©ҠгӮҶжҪҜжө ?
     */
    private String attrWhereCondition;

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«жө пҪҮзҲңй”ӣе ўж•Өжөңеәўз…Ўз’ҮгҲЎжӨӮйҺёеӣ§з•ҫйҚҸиңӮз¶ӢйҗЁеҮұartCategoryй”ӣ?
     */
    private String partCategoryCode;

    /**
     * йҗўзҶёеһҡйҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     * йҸҚз…ҺзҙЎй”ӣжӯұartCategoryCode:attrCode attrComparator attrValue where
     * attrWhereCondition
     * з»ҖиҪ°з·Ҙй”ӣ?drive:Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed like %5400%"
     * 
     * @return йҗӯо…һз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ
     */
    public String toShortString() {
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();

        // еЁЈиҜІе§һй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«жө пҪҮзҲң
        if (partCategoryCode != null && !partCategoryCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(partCategoryCode).append(":");
        }

        // еЁЈиҜІе§һзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СӮе”¬йҗ®дҪөвӮ¬дҪ№зҳ®жқҲеҶӘоғҒйҚңеұҪвӮ¬?
        if (attrCode != null && !attrCode.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(attrCode);
            if (attrComparator != null && !attrComparator.isEmpty() && attrValue != null && !attrValue.isEmpty()) {
                sb.append(" ").append(attrComparator);
                // е§Јж—Үз·қз»—п№ҖжӢ°йҚҠй—ҙз®Јй—Ӯзҝ з¬үйҚ”зҠөв”–йҸҚзЎ·зҙқжёҡе¬Әоӣ§ ">=5" й‘°еұјз¬үйҸ„?">= 5"
                sb.append(attrValue);
            }
        }

        // еЁЈиҜІе§һ where йҸүвҖІж¬ў
        if (attrWhereCondition != null && !attrWhereCondition.isEmpty()) {
            sb.append(" where ").append(attrWhereCondition);
        }

        return sb.toString();
    }
}
```

```
package com.jmix.executor.impl.algmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrPara;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.AttrParaType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.IModule;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.Pair;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.IModuleInput;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.MultiInstPartCategoryInput;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.PartCategoryInput;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.PartCategoryInputBase;
import com.jmix.executor.model.AlgLoaderException;
import com.jmix.executor.southinf.IModuleAlg;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.lang.reflect.Method;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.LinkedHashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з»ҫС…з•»еЁүжӣһз–„йҗң?
 * ж¶“ж’ҙж•һжөңеәЎеҙҹж¶“оҒҲе„ҙжө и·әеһҺз»«иҚӨж®‘з»ҫпёҪжҪ«жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠ
 * 
 * @since 2025-12-27
 */
@Slf4j
public class MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl extends ModuleBaseAlgImpl implements PartCategoryAlgImpl {

    private Map<String, Pair<PartCategoryInput, SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl>> partCategoryAlgs = new LinkedHashMap<>();

    /**
     * жҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     */
    public MultiInstPartCategoryAlgImpl() {
        super();
    }

    @Override
    public int getInstId() {
        return ModuleInst.INVALID_INSTANCE_ID;
    }

    public List<SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl> getPartCategoryInsts() {
        return new ArrayList<>(partCategoryAlgs.values().stream().map(Pair::getSecond).collect(Collectors.toList()));
    }

    public MultiInstPartCategoryInput getMultiInstPartCategoryInput() {
        return (MultiInstPartCategoryInput) getModule();
    }

    public List<PartCategoryInput> getPartCategoryInputs() {
        return getMultiInstPartCategoryInput().getPartCategoryInputs();
    }

    protected void initData(AlgCPModel model, IModule module,
            IModuleInput partCategoryInput,
            IModuleAlg moduleAlgFile) {
        super.initData(model, module, partCategoryInput, moduleAlgFile);
        for (PartCategoryInput partCategoryInputInst : this.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
            SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlg = new SingleInstPartCategoryAlgImpl();
            if (partCategoryAlgs.containsKey(partCategoryInputInst.getInsKey())) {
                log.error("PartCategoryInputInst " + partCategoryInputInst.getInsKey()
                        + " already exists, skipping");
                throw new AlgLoaderException("PartCategoryInputInst " + partCategoryInputInst.getInsKey()
                        + " already exists, skipping");
            }
            partCategoryAlgs.put(partCategoryInputInst.getInsKey(), Pair.of(partCategoryInputInst, partCategoryAlg));
            partCategoryAlg.initData(model, (IModule) partCategoryInputInst.getFilteredCategory(),
                    partCategoryInputInst,
                    moduleAlgFile);
        }
    }

    protected void setSumSumToSumAttrParaRelation() {
        // з’Ғеү§з–Ҷ йҺ¬з»ҳвӮ¬?йҚң?йҺ¬иҜІеҪүй–Іеҝ•ж®‘йҚҸеҙҮйғҙ
        List<AttrPara> sumSumAttrParas = getMultiInstPartCategoryInput().getSumSumAttrParas();
        for (AttrPara attrPara : sumSumAttrParas) {
            // йҸҲеӨүз«ҙж¶“оҒ„еҮЎзјҒеҝҡз·ӯйҚҸгғҜзҙқйҚ’ж¬җзң№йҺ¬и®ізҜғз’Ғеү§з–ҶйҸҒзүҲеөҒ
            // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүе§№еӣЁвӮ¬иҜІеҮЎзјҒеҝҡз·ӯйҚҸгғҜзҙқж¶“вӮ¬жқҲж’іеҸҶйҗЁеӢӘиҙҹйҚ‘?
            // йҺ¬з»ҳвӮ¬иҜІеј¬й”ӣеұҪжӢ°йҺ¬иҜІеј¬йҗЁеӢ«еҸ§з»ҜдјҷзҙқйҚҡеәЈз”»йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”йҚҗж¬“вӮ¬жҳҸз·«й”ӣе қоҳҝж¶“оҒ…вӮ¬з»ҳвӮ¬и®із®Јй—ӮзЈҮssue, йҺ¬иҜІеј¬йҚңеұјз¬…й—ҲгҲўж®‘йҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢ«еҸ§з»Ҝдјҷзҙҡ
            Pair<Boolean, Integer> hasSetSumPara = hasSetSumPara(attrPara);
            if (hasSetSumPara.getFirst()) {
                ParaVar sumSumParaVar = getSumSumParaByAttr(attrPara.getAttrCode());
                if (!sumSumParaVar.getHasInputed()) {
                    sumSumParaVar.setInputValue(hasSetSumPara.getSecond());
                    sumSumParaVar.setHasInputed(true);
                }
            }
```

```
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҸҲвӮ¬зҒҸеҝ”жҡҹй–ІеҝӣжӘәйҚ’?
     */
    public static final int MIN_QUANTITY = 0;

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҗӯо… зҙӘйҗ®дҪёеў зјӮвӮ¬
     */
    public static final String SHORT_CODE_PREFIX = "PT";

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўз»«иҜІзҖ·
     */
    private PartType partType = PartType.ATOMIC;

    /**
     * йҚҳзҶ·з“ҷPartйҗЁеӢӯжҙ°иӨ°жӣҡзҺҜ
     */
    private Long price = 0L;

    /**
     * йҚҳзҶ·з“ҷPartйҗЁеӢ¬жё¶жҫ¶С„жҡҹй–І?
     */
    private Integer maxQuantity = MAX_QUANTITY;

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮжҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸҒдјҙеҷә
     * 
     * @return жҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸҒдјҙеҷә
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Integer getDefaultQuantity() {
        return super.getDefaultValue();
    }

    /**
     * йҚҸе¬®ж®•PartзҖөзЎ…и–„
     *
     * @return йҚҸе¬®ж®•йҗЁеҮұartзҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Part clone() {
        Part to = new Part();
        super.clone(to);
        // жҫ¶е¶…еҹ—Partйҗ—и§„ж№ҒзҒһзӮҙвӮ¬?
        to.setPartType(this.getPartType());
        to.setPrice(this.getPrice());
        to.setMaxQuantity(this.getMaxQuantity());
        return to;
    }

}
```

```
     * й–¬е¶…е·»з’ӢеҶӘж•Ө setPartUnSelected(Part part)
     *
     * @param parts й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    public void setPartUnSelected(List<Part> parts) {
        if (parts == null || parts.isEmpty()) {
            return;
        }
        for (Part part : parts) {
            setPartUnSelected(part);
        }
    }

    /**
     * з’Ғеү§з–Ҷй–®г„Өж¬ўж¶“зғҳж№ӯй–«еӨүи…‘йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬?
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒ part.code йҺөжғ§еҹҢзҖөз‘°з°І partVarй”ӣеұјеЁҮйҗў?ortools з’Ғеү§з–Ҷй”ӣ?
     * - partVar.isSelected == 0
     * - partVar.qty == 0
     *
     * @param part й–®г„Өж¬ў
     */
    public void setPartUnSelected(Part part) {
        if (part == null) {
            log.warn("Part is null, cannot set unselected");
            return;
        }

        // йҸҚи§„еөҒ part.code йҺөжғ§еҹҢзҖөз‘°з°І partVar
        PartVar partVar = getPartVar(part.getCode());

        // жөЈи·Ёж•Ө ortools з’Ғеү§з–Ҷз»ҫпёҪжҪ«
        // partVar.isSelected == 0
        model.addEquality(partVar.getIsSelected(), 0);

        // partVar.qty == 0
        model.addEquality(partVar.getQty(), 0);

        log.info("Set part unselected: code={}, isSelected=0, qty=0", part.getCode());
    }

    public List<PartVar> getAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
        if (filterConditionStr == null || filterConditionStr.isEmpty()) {
            return new ArrayList<>(partMap.values());
        } else {
            return FilterExpressionExecutor.doSelect(new ArrayList<>(partMap.values()), filterConditionStr);
        }
    }

    /**
     * жқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө и·әеҪүй–І?
     * 
     * @param filterConditionStr
     * @return з»—оғҝз«ҙж¶“оҒ…ж§ёжқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҚҡеәҜзҙқз»—оғҝз«ҙж¶“оҒ…з—…йҸҲеӨҺз№ғе©ҠгӮҮж®‘
     */
    public Pair<List<PartVar>, List<PartVar>> filterAllPartVars(String filterConditionStr) {
        List<PartVar> filterPartVars = getAllPartVars(filterConditionStr);
        Set<String> filterPartVarCodes = filterPartVars.stream().map(PartVar::getCode).collect(Collectors.toSet());
        List<PartVar> noFilterPartVars = new ArrayList<>();
        for (PartVar partVar : partMap.values()) {
            if (!filterPartVarCodes.contains(partVar.getCode())) {
                noFilterPartVars.add(partVar);
            }
        }
        return Pair.of(filterPartVars, noFilterPartVars);
    }

    public String toString() {
        return this.module.getCode();
    }
}
```

```
    /**
     * еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰзң°з‘ҷпҪ…ж«’йҗҳиҲөвӮ¬дҪ№ж§ёйҚҡп№ҖгҒ‘з’җ?
     *
     * @param status е§№еӮқР’йҚЈг„§е§ёйҺ¬?
     * @return йҸ„оҲҡжғҒжҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұ
     */
    private boolean isFailed(CpSolverStatus status) {
        return status != CpSolverStatus.OPTIMAL
                && status != CpSolverStatus.FEASIBLE
                && status != CpSolverStatus.INFEASIBLE;
    }

    /**
     * йҺөСҶо”‘з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺәг„§жӮҠ
     * 
     * @param module          еҰҜвҖіжҪЎзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @param req             йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҷе¶Ҷеё№з’Үй”Ӣзң°
     * @param isAttachRelax   йҸ„оҲҡжғҒй—„еӢ«е§һйҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©Җеҷә
     * @param confictedRelaxs йҚҗиҢ¬зҚҠйҸүжғ§зҙұйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     * @return йҚ–е‘ӯжғҲе§№еӮқР’йҚЈг„§е§ёйҺ¬дҪёжӢ°йҚҘзӮ¶зҡҹзҖөзЎ…и–„йҗЁеҮҙunInferParasRsp
     * @throws AlgLoaderException   иӨ°ж’¶з•»еЁүжӣһе§һжқһи—үж«’йҸҲоҒ…еЈҳйҚ’зүҲжӨӮйҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯ
     * @throws AlgExecutorException иӨ°ж’іеһұеҜӨиҷ№з•»еЁүжӣҹеўҪзҗӣеұҫжӨӮйҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯ
     */
    private RunInferParasRsp runInferParas(Module module,
            InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax,
            List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж «е®ійҸүзҶёДҒйҚЁ?
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = initConstraintModel(module, req, isAttachRelax, confictedRelaxs);
        AlgCPModel model = alg.getModel();

        if (config.isLogModelProto()) {
            // зҒҸе”ҢoduleйҗЁеҮңpModelProtoж·Үв„ғдј…жқҲж’іеҡӯйҚ’зүҲжһғжө зҰјonfig.logFilePath/module.proto.txt
            model.getCpModel().exportToFile(config.getLogFilePath() + File.separator + module.getCode() + ".proto.txt");
        }
        CpSolver solver = new CpSolver();
        solver.getParameters().setEnumerateAllSolutions(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        solver.getParameters().setNumSearchWorkers(1); // йҚ—жӣ еҡҺз»Ӣе¬«жӮіз»ұоқ®зҙқй—ғеҸүо„ӣйҸҲеӨҗеҷёжҫ¶е¶ҲР’
        log.info("solver parameters:\n" + solver.getParameters().toString());
        // йҚҷоҲӣеҜңй—ҮвӮ¬з’Ғеү§з–ҶйҸҮжқ‘оҳҝйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ
        ModuleInstSolutionCallBack cb = new ModuleInstSolutionCallBack(module, alg);
        CpSolverStatus status = solver.solve(model.getCpModel(), cb);
        log.info("solver  models:\n");
        model.printModelSummary();
        return new RunInferParasRsp(status, cb, alg.getModel(), solver);
    }

    private ModuleAlgImpl initConstraintModel(Module module, InferParasReq req,
            boolean isAttachRelax, List<RelaxVar> confictedRelaxs)
            throws AlgLoaderException, AlgExecutorException {
        // йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ
        ModuleAlgImpl alg = createConstraintAlg(module.getId(), module.getCode());
        AlgCPModel model = new AlgCPModel();
        model.setIsAttachRelax(isAttachRelax);
        model.setConfictedRelaxVars(confictedRelaxs);
        // йҸҚи§„еөҒloadTypeйҚҗеҶІз•ҫйҸ„оҲҡжғҒжөЈи·Ёж•Өе®ёоҮҖеҷәйҚ”зҠәжөҮеҰҜвҖізҖ·
        if (config.getLoadType() == ConstraintConfig.LOAD_TYPE_INCREMENTAL) {
            // е®ёоҮҖеҷәйҚ”зҠәжөҮеҰҜвҖізҖ·
            List<String> inputProgObjs = ReqUtils.buildInputProgObjs(req);

            // йҸҢгғЁоҮ—зҖӣж„¬жөҳ
            Pair<List<String>, List<RefProgObjSchema>> relativePair = module
                    .querySubGraph(inputProgObjs.toArray(new String[0]));

            // йҺөж’іеөғrelativePair.first,relativePair.second, йҸҲо„ҒоӮјйҺәг„§жӮҠеЁ‘еӨҠеј·йҚ’зҷіxeRulesйҚңе®”xeProgObjs
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved rules: {}", relativePair.getFirst());
            log.info("Incremental loading - involved progObjs: {}",
                    relativePair.getSecond().stream().map(RefProgObjSchema::getProgObjCode)
                            .collect(java.util.stream.Collectors.toList()));

            // з’ӢеҶӘж•ӨйҸӮжү®ж®‘initModelйҸӮи§„зЎ¶,issue:е®ёоҮҖеҷәйҚҡеәЈз”»зҖ№зӮөе№Ү
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        } else {
            // йҚҸг„©еҷәйҚ”зҠәжөҮеҰҜвҖізҖ·
            alg.init(model, module, toModuleInput(module, req));
        }
```

```
    private ModuleInput toModuleInput(Module startModule, InferParasReq req) {
        ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
        moduleInput.setModuleId(startModule.getId());
        moduleInput.setModuleCode(startModule.getCode());
        moduleInput.setMainPartInst(req.getMainPartInst());
        moduleInput.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
        moduleInput.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
        // moduleInput.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
        moduleInput.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        // moduleInput.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
        Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(req.getPartConstraintReqs(),
                startModule);
        Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = ModuleConstraintExecutorImpl.filterClone(startModule,
                partConstraintReqMap);
        moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());
        return moduleInput;
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе’әnferParasReqжқһо„ҒеҙІж¶“зҜ’nferPartCategoryReq
     * 
     * @param req йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹйҚҷе¶Ҷеё№з’Үй”Ӣзң°
     * @return й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з’Үй”Ӣзң°
     */
    private InferPartCategoryReq toInferPartCategoryReq(InferParasReq req) {
        InferPartCategoryReq cReq = new InferPartCategoryReq();
        cReq.setPreParaInsts(req.getPreParaInsts());
        cReq.setPrePartInsts(req.getPrePartInsts());
        cReq.setPartConstraintReqs(req.getPartConstraintReqs());
        cReq.setEnumerateAllSolution(req.isEnumerateAllSolution());
        cReq.setPartCategoryCode(req.getPartCategoryCode());
        return cReq;
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒеҰҜвҖіжҪЎIDйҺҙж ЁДҒйҚ§жӨҫе”¬йҗ®дҪҪе№ҸйҚҷж ЁДҒйҚ§жҘҖоҮ®з’һ?
     * 
     * @param moduleId   еҰҜвҖіжҪЎIDй”ӣеұҪеҪІж¶“з°„ull
     * @param moduleCode еҰҜвҖіжҪЎжө пҪҮзҲңй”ӣеұҪеҪІж¶“з°„ull
     * @return йҺөжғ§еҹҢйҗЁеӢ¬ДҒйҚ§жҘҖоҮ®з’һвҳ…зҙқжҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸҲоҒ…еЈҳйҚ’жқҝеһҜжқ©ж–ҝжҙ–null
     */
    private Module getModule(Long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
        if (moduleId != null) {
            return moduleMap.get(moduleId);
        }
        if (moduleCode != null) {
            for (Module m : moduleMap.values()) {
                if (moduleCode.equals(m.getCode())) {
                    return m;
                }
            }
        }
        log.error("Module not found: moduleId={}, moduleCode={}", moduleId, moduleCode);
        throw new AlgLoaderException(
                String.format("Module not found: moduleId=%s, moduleCode=%s", moduleId, moduleCode));
    }

    /**
     * йҺөСҶо”‘йҚҡеәЎоҳ©йҗһ?
     * 
     * @param module    еҰҜвҖіжҪЎ
     * @param solutions йҚҳзҶ·оқҗз‘ҷпҪ…е–…йҸӮи§„о”Қ
     * @return жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠйҚҡеәЈж®‘з‘ҷпҪ…е–…йҸӮи§„о”Қ
     */
    private List<ModuleInst> executePostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> solutions) {
        List<ModuleInst> result = solutions;

        for (ExtensibleProcess process : extensibleProcesses) {
            if (process instanceof InferParasPostProcess) {
                result = applyPostProcess(module, result, (InferParasPostProcess) process);
            }
        }

        return result;
    }

    /**
     * жҗҙж—Ӯж•ӨйҚ—жӣҡйҮңйҚҡеәЎоҳ©йҗһе—ҳзҘҰз»Ӣ?

     * @param module        еҰҜвҖіжҪЎ

     */
    private List<ModuleInst> applyPostProcess(Module module, List<ModuleInst> currentResult,
            InferParasPostProcess postProcess) {
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> processResult = postProcess.postProcess(module, currentResult);
        if (processResult.getCode() != Result.SUCCESS || processResult.getData() == null) {
            log.warn("Post process failed: {}, message: {}",
                    postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName(), processResult.getMessage());
            return currentResult;
        }
        log.info("Applied post process: {} successfully", postProcess.getClass().getSimpleName());
        return processResult.getData();
```

```
        // йҸҚеӣ§еҷҜйҚ–ж өзҙқ 1йҠҶдҪ№зҳЎж¶“зҢәootCategoryйҚҷоҒ…ж№Ғ1ж¶“оҒҺзҙқ 2йҠҶдҪёзқҳжөңеәЎжӮ“ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“зҢәootCategoryйҗЁеҮұartConstraintReqй”ӣеұҪжӮҺйӘһи·әж№Әж¶“вӮ¬з’§?
        // 3йҠҶдҪёеё«жҝ®е¬®жё¶е§№еӮҷи…‘й–Ҫе қоҮ®зҖӣж„®ж®‘з‘•дҪҪжөҶйҺ№оқӯиҙҹrootCategory
        return normalizedReqs;
    }

    /**
     * жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з»ҫпёҪжҪ«
     *
     * @param partCategoryReq й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з’Үй”Ӣзң°
     * @return йҺәг„§жӮҠзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> processProduct(Module startModule, InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
        try {
            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();

            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap = normalizePartConstraint(
                    partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs(), startModule);
            // йҸҢгғҰеЈҳйҚҳзҶ·оқҗй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«
            Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterResult = filterClone(startModule, partConstraintReqMap);
            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(filterResult.getSecond());

            Module filterModule = filterResult.getFirst();
            log.info("Priority-orignal module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(startModule));
            log.info("Priority-filter module: {}", ModuleUtils.toShortString(filterModule));
            SolverResult sr = null;
            // еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰж§ёйҚҡпёҪж№ҒжөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСҶоқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙқжҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸҲеӨҠеһҜжөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҚ’е—ҷйӘҮе§№еӮқР’
            if (filterModule.hasAllPriorityRule()) {
                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
            } else {
                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(filterModule, moduleInput);
            }
            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());

        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to process Module constraint", e);
            return Result.failed("Failed to process Module constraint: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    public static Pair<Module, List<PartCategoryInputBase>> filterClone(Module startModule,
            Map<String, List<PartConstraintReq>> partConstraintReqMap) {
        Module result = startModule.clone();
        List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
        List<PartConstraintReq> reqs = null;
        PartCategory filterPartCategory = null;
        for (PartCategory partCategory : startModule.getPartCategorys()) {
            reqs = partConstraintReqMap.get(partCategory.getCode());
            if (reqs == null) {
                // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸ„оҲңв”“ж¶“жғ§оҳҝзҖ№зӮ°з·ҘйҗЁеӢ¬е„ҸйҚҗзўүзҙқжҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸ„оҲӣж–Ғжқ©ж¶ҳе№“йҗЁеӢ¶зҙқTODOй”ӣж°ӯж§ёж¶“е¶Ҷж§ёж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“оҒғзҜғеЁҢв„ғж№ҒйҗЁеӢ¬жӨӮйҚҠж¬ҺзҜғзҗӣгғҘеҺ–ж¶“вӮ¬ж¶“?
                if (partCategory.isEnumMutiInst()) {
                    continue;
                }
                result.addPart(partCategory); // зҖ№еұҪеҸҸйҺёоҒҮз№ғйҸү?
            } else {
                if (reqs.size() == 1) {
                    PartConstraintReq req = reqs.get(0);
                    filterPartCategory = partCategory.filterClone(req);
                    String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
                            filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
                            req.getAttrWhereCondition());
                    log.info(msg);
                    if (filterPartCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
                        throw new AlgExecutorException(msg);
                    }
                    // result.addPart(filterPartCategory);
                    result.addPartCategory(filterPartCategory);
                    PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl
                            .toPartCategoryInput(
                                    filterPartCategory, req);
                    partCategoryInput.setSumAttrParas(partCategory.getAttrParas(AttrParaType.Sum));
                    partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
                } else {
```

```
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Part;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.SolverResult;
import com.jmix.executor.model.InferPartCategoryReq;
import com.jmix.executor.model.PartConstraintReq;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.HashSet;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Set;

/**
 * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з»ҫпёҪжҪ«йҺөСҶо”‘йҚЈг„Ҙз–„йҗңжү®иў«
 * ж¶“ж’»жЈ¬жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«йҗ©зЁҝеҸ§йҗЁеӢӯе®ійҸүзҶёзң°з‘ҷ?
 *
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Slf4j
public class PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl extends ModuleBaseConstraintExecutorImpl {

    public PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl() {
    }

    /**
     * жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з»ҫпёҪжҪ«
     *
     * @param partCategoryReq й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«з’Үй”Ӣзң°
     * @return йҺәг„§жӮҠзјҒж’ҙзҒү
     */
    @Override
    public Result<List<ModuleInst>> doProcess(InferPartCategoryReq partCategoryReq) {
        try {
            // йҸҢгғҰеЈҳйҚҳзҶ·оқҗй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«
            PartCategory originalCategory = module.getPartCategory(partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
            if (originalCategory == null) {
                log.error("PartCategory not found: {}", partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
                return Result.failed("PartCategory not found: " + partCategoryReq.getPartCategoryCode());
            }
            log.info("Priority-orginal aparts: {}", originalCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString());
            // й–¬е¶…е·»йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө еүҒе®ійҸүзҶ»оҮ¬е§№еӮҰзҙқй–«ж„ӯо„һжқ©еӣЁжҠӨ
            PartCategory filteredCategory = originalCategory;
            List<PartCategoryInputBase> partCategoryInputs = new ArrayList<>();
            for (PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq : partCategoryReq.getPartConstraintReqs()) {
                // ж¶“вӮ¬йҸүо“¶artConstraintReqжөјж°іоқҰйҺ·е——еһҺж¶“гӮҶжҪҜз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣеұјз«ҙйҸүв„ғж§ёжқ©еӣЁжҠӨз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣе ҹзүҙйҺ№з•җhereйҸүвҖІж¬ўжқ©еӣЁжҠӨй”ӣеӨӣзҙқж¶“вӮ¬йҸүв„ғж§ёз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣе ҹзүҙйҺ№з”ўttrCode,
                // attrComparator, attrValueйҸӢеӢ«зј“з»ҫпёҪжҪ«зҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝҘзҙҡ
                // йҸҢгғЁоҮ—е©ҠВӨеҶ»йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҗЁеҮұartCategory
                filteredCategory = filteredCategory.filterClone(partConstraintReq);
                String msg = String.format("Priority-filtered aparts: {%s} by {%s}",
                        filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString(),
                        partConstraintReq.toShortString());
                log.info(msg);
                if (filteredCategory.getAllAtomicPartShortString().isEmpty()) {
                    return Result.noSolution(msg);
                }
                PartCategoryInput partCategoryInput = PartCategoryConstraintExecutorImpl.toPartCategoryInput(
                        filteredCategory, partConstraintReq);
                partCategoryInputs.add(partCategoryInput);
            }
            ModuleInput moduleInput = new ModuleInput();
            moduleInput.setPartCategoryInputs(partCategoryInputs);

            SolverResult sr = null;
            // еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰж§ёйҚҡпёҪж№ҒжөјжЁәеҺӣз»ҫСҶоқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙқжҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸҲеӨҠеһҜжөЈи·Ёж•ӨйҚ’е—ҷйӘҮе§№еӮқР’
            Module moduleClone = module.clone();

            if (filteredCategory.hasPriorityRule()) {
                PartCategory mergedFilteredCategory = buildMergedFilteredCategory(originalCategory,
                        partCategoryInputs);
                moduleClone.addPartCategory(mergedFilteredCategory);
                sr = solveWithPriorityConstraints(
                        moduleClone, moduleInput);
            } else {
                moduleClone.addPartCategory(filteredCategory);
                sr = solveWithOutPriorityConstraints(moduleClone, moduleInput);
            }
            return Result.success(sr.getSolutions());

        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.error("Failed to process part category constraint", e);
            return Result.failed("Failed to process part category constraint: " + e.getMessage());
        }
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе—ӣе„ҙжө и·әеһӘзҗӣг„ҰеқҠйҚ”зҠІеҹҢйҚҡе қиӢҹйҗЁеӢ«её«зҖӣж„°е„ҙжө зҰЎapж¶“?
     *
     * @param mergedAtomicParts йҚҡе қиӢҹйҗЁеӢ«её«зҖӣж„°е„ҙжө зҰЎap
     * @param parts             й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    private void addPartsToMap(Map<String, Part> mergedAtomicParts, List<Part> parts) {
        for (Part part : parts) {
            mergedAtomicParts.put(part.getCode(), part);
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҸӢеӢ«зј“йҚҡе қиӢҹйҚҡеәЈж®‘жқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҚ’е—ҷиў«

... (truncated)
```

```
    public static PartCategoryInput toPartCategoryInput(PartCategory filteredCategory,
            PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq) {
        // йҸҚи§„еөҒpartConstraintReqйҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҮҹPartCategoryInput
        PartCategoryInput fromReq = new PartCategoryInput();
        setPartCategoryInputBase(fromReq, partConstraintReq);
        fromReq.setFilteredCategory(filteredCategory);
        return fromReq;
    }

    /**
     * з’Ғеү§з–ҶPartCategoryInputBase
     * 
     * @param partCategoryInput
     * @param partConstraintReq
     */
    public static void setPartCategoryInputBase(PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput,
            PartConstraintReq partConstraintReq) {
        partCategoryInput.setSumAttrCode(partConstraintReq.getAttrCode());
        partCategoryInput.setAttrType(partConstraintReq.getAttrType());
        partCategoryInput.setComparator(partConstraintReq.getAttrComparator());
        if (partConstraintReq.getAttrComparator() != null) {
            partCategoryInput.setLeftValue(Integer.parseInt(partConstraintReq.getAttrValue()));
        }
        partCategoryInput.setOrgReq(partConstraintReq);
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶зҖ№зӮ°з·Ҙ

    protected ModuleAlgImpl createConstraintAlg(long moduleId, String moduleCode) {
        return moduleAlgClassLoader.newConstraintAlg(moduleCode);
    }
```

```
     * йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”ж¶“еӨҢоқ’йҚҰзғҳж«ҷй”ӣ?
     * йҚҰзғҳж«ҷ1й”ӣж°«зІҺйҸҲеӨҺз№ғе©ҠгӮҶжҪҜжө и®№зҙқжҝЎ?"where Speed=5400" -> attrWhereCondition="Speed=5400", attrComparator=null
     * йҚҰзғҳж«ҷ2й”ӣж°«зІҺйҸҲеӨӢзң№йҺ¬з»ҳжҪҜжө и®№зҙқжҝЎ?"Sum_Capacity >=5" -> attrWhereCondition=null, attrType=Sum, attrCode=Capacity, attrComparator=">=", attrValue="5"
     * йҚҰзғҳж«ҷ3й”ӣж°¬жӮ“йҸғиҲөж№Ғе§№еӣЁвӮ¬з»ҳжҪҜжө и·әжӢ°жқ©еӣЁжҠӨйҸүвҖІж¬ўй”ӣеұҪоӣ§ "Sum_Capacity >=5 where Speed=5400" -> йҚҡеұҫжӨӮз’Ғеү§з–Ҷж¶“гӮ„йҮңйҸүвҖІж¬ў
     *
     * @param attrExpr зҒһзӮҙвӮ¬СҶгҖғжқҲжғ§зҙЎй”ӣе қеҪІй‘іи—үеҜҳйҚҡ?where зҖӣж„¬еҪһй”ӣ?
     * @param req й–®г„Өж¬ўз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з’Үй”Ӣзң°зҖөзЎ…и–„й”ӣеІҖж•ӨжөңеәӨоҶ•зјғоҶҝР’йҸӢж„®зІЁйҸӢ?
     */
    protected void parseAttrExpr(String attrExpr, PartConstraintReq req) {
        String trimmedExpr = attrExpr.trim();

        // жҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠ where зҖӣж„¬еҪһй”ӣе Јз№ғе©ҠгӮҶжҪҜжө и®№зҙҡ
        // йҸҖоҲӣеҜ”жҫ¶ж°ұоқ’йҸҚз…ҺзҙЎй”ӣ?,where XXX", "where XXX", ", where XXX"
        int whereIndex = -1;
        String whereCondition = null;

        // йҚҸе қзҡҫз’Ү?" where " (йҚ“е¶…жӮ—й–®иҠҘж№Ғз»Ңзғҳзүё)
        whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf(" where ");
        if (whereIndex >= 0) {
            whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 7).trim();
            trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
        } else {
            // йҚҗе¶…зҡҫз’Ү?"where " (йҚ“е¶үжҪ°еЁҢв„ғж№Ғз»Ңзғҳзүё)
            whereIndex = trimmedExpr.indexOf("where ");
            if (whereIndex >= 0) {
                whereCondition = trimmedExpr.substring(whereIndex + 6).trim();
                trimmedExpr = trimmedExpr.substring(0, whereIndex).trim();
            }
        }

        if (whereCondition != null && !whereCondition.isEmpty()) {
            req.setAttrWhereCondition(whereCondition);
        }

        // з‘ҷпҪҶзҖҪе§№еӣЁвӮ¬з»ҳжҪҜжө е •е„ҙйҚ’?
        if (trimmedExpr.isEmpty()) {
            // йҚҰзғҳж«ҷ1й”ӣж°«зІҺйҸҲеӨҺз№ғе©ҠгӮҶжҪҜжө и®№зҙқеЁҢв„ғж№Ғе§№еӣЁвӮ¬з»ҳжҪҜжө ?
            return;
        }

        // жөЈи·Ёж•Өе§қпҪ…еһҜзҗӣг„ЁжҸӘеҜ®еҝҡР’йҸӢж„¶зҙ°attrCode comparator value
        Pattern pattern = Pattern.compile("([A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\\s*(==|!=|<=|>=|<|>)\\s*(\\d+)");
        Matcher matcher = pattern.matcher(trimmedExpr);

        if (matcher.matches()) {
            String mergedAttrCode = matcher.group(1).trim();
            String[] mergedParts = mergedAttrCode.split(AttrPara.CODE_SEPARATOR);
            if (mergedParts.length == 2) {
                req.setAttrType(AttrParaType.valueOf(mergedParts[0]));
                req.setAttrCode(mergedParts[1]);
            } else {
                throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
            }
            req.setAttrComparator(matcher.group(2).trim());
            req.setAttrValue(matcher.group(3).trim());
        } else {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid attribute expression format: " + trimmedExpr);
        }
    }

    /**
     * йҚ©иҪ°з°¬й–®г„Өж¬ўз»ҫпёҪжҪ«жқ©ж¶ңо”‘йҺәг„§жӮҠйҺәг„Ёеҙҳ
     * 
     * @param constraintReqs з»ҫпёҪжҪ«з’Үй”Ӣзң°зҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“еҸүжҡҹзјҒ?
     * @return йҺәг„ЁеҙҳйҗЁеӢ¬ДҒйҚ§жҘҖз–„жёҡе¬ӘеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    protected List<ModuleInst> inferRecommendModule(String... constraintReqs) {
        return inferRecommend("", constraintReqs);

    /**
     * йҚ©иҪ°з°¬й–®г„Өж¬ўз»ҫпёҪжҪ«жқ©ж¶ңо”‘йҺәг„§жӮҠйҺәг„Ёеҙҳ
```

```diff
+    private void applyDecisionStrategies() {
+        ModuleInput req = getModuleInput();
+        if (req.getPartCategoryInputs() == null || req.getPartCategoryInputs().isEmpty()) {
+            return;
+        }
+        for (PartCategoryInputBase partCategoryInput : req.getPartCategoryInputs()) {
+            List<StrategyConfig> strategies = partCategoryInput.getDecisionStrategies();
+            if (strategies == null || strategies.isEmpty()) {
+                continue;
+            }
+            applyDecisionStrategies(partCategoryInput.getPartCategoryCode(), strategies);
+        }
+    }
+
+    private void applyDecisionStrategies(String partCategoryCode, List<StrategyConfig> strategies) {
+        PartCategoryAlgImpl partCategoryAlg = getPartCategoryAlg(partCategoryCode);
+        if (partCategoryAlg == null) {
+            log.warn("PartCategoryAlg not found for decision strategy: {}", partCategoryCode);
+            return;
+        }
+        for (StrategyConfig config : strategies) {
+            if (config == null || config.getStrategyType() == null
+                    || config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.UNSPECIFIED) {
+                continue;
+            }
+            List<PartVar> partVars = new ArrayList<>(partCategoryAlg.getAllPartVars(""));
+            if (partVars.isEmpty()) {
+                continue;
+            }
+            String attrCode = config.getSortAttributeCode();
+            partVars.sort(Comparator
+                    .comparingInt((PartVar partVar) -> resolveDecisionSortValue(partVar, attrCode))
+                    .thenComparing(PartVar::getCode));
+            IntVar[] variables = partVars.stream()
+                    .map(PartVar::getIsSelected)
+                    .toArray(IntVar[]::new);
+            DomainReductionStrategy reductionStrategy = config.getStrategyType() == StrategyType.ASCENDING
+                    ? DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE
+                    : DomainReductionStrategy.SELECT_MAX_VALUE;
+            model.addDecisionStrategy(variables, VariableSelectionStrategy.CHOOSE_FIRST, reductionStrategy);
+            log.info("Applied decision strategy: category={}, type={}, attr={}, vars={}",
+                    partCategoryCode, config.getStrategyType(), attrCode,
+                    partVars.stream().map(PartVar::getCode).collect(Collectors.toList()));
+        }
+    }
+
+    private int resolveDecisionSortValue(PartVar partVar, String attrCode) {
+        if (partVar == null || partVar.getBase() == null || attrCode == null || attrCode.isEmpty()) {
+            return Integer.MAX_VALUE;
+        }
+        if ("price".equals(attrCode)) {
+            Part part = (Part) partVar.getBase();
+            return part.getPrice() == null ? Integer.MAX_VALUE : part.getPrice().intValue();
+        }
+        try {
+            return partVar.getAttr4IntDefault(attrCode, Integer.MAX_VALUE);
+        } catch (RuntimeException ex) {
+            log.warn("Invalid decision strategy sort attr: part={}, attr={}", partVar.getCode(), attrCode);
+            return Integer.MAX_VALUE;
+        }
+    }
```

```
/**
 * йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С„ж•һз‘ҷ?
 * йҗўг„Өз°¬йҸҚеӣӘоҶҮйҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬Сғз•ҫж¶”?

}
```

```diff
+package com.jmix.opti.search;
+
+import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
+import com.jmix.coretest.ModuleScenarioTestBase;
+import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr.DynamicAttributeType;
+import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.AssignType;
+import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.para.ParaType;
+import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.DAttrAnno1;
+import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ModuleAnno;
+import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.ParaAnno;
+import com.jmix.tool.bbuilder.anno.PartAnno;
+
+import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
+
+public class SearchStrategyTest extends ModuleScenarioTestBase {
+
+    @ModuleAnno(id = 701L)
+    static public class SearchStrategyConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {
+
+        @PartAnno
+        @DAttrAnno1(code = "CoreCount", dynAttrType = DynamicAttributeType.E_INT, options = {
+                "Core_4:4",
+                "Core_8:8",
+                "Core_16:16" })
+        private PartCategoryVar cpu;
+
+        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = { "4" }, price = 10)
+        private PartVar cpu1;
+
+        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = { "8" }, price = 5)
+        private PartVar cpu2;
+
+        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", attrs = { "16" }, price = 100)
+        private PartVar cpu3;
+
+        @ParaAnno(fatherCode = "cpu", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
+        private ParaVar Sum_CoreCount;
+
+        @PartAnno
+        private PartCategoryVar disk;
+
+        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "disk", price = 50)
+        private PartVar disk1;
+
+        @PartAnno(fatherCode = "disk", price = 30)
+        private PartVar disk2;
+
+        @ParaAnno(fatherCode = "disk", type = ParaType.INTEGER, assignType = AssignType.INPUT)
+        private ParaVar Sum_Quantity;
+    }
+
+    public SearchStrategyTest() {
+        super(SearchStrategyConstraint.class);
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCase001_CpuAscendingByPrice() {
+        inferRecommendModule("cpu:Sum_CoreCount >=1 [strategy=ASCENDING:price]");
+
+        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu2(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCase002_CpuDescendingByPrice() {
+        inferRecommendModule("cpu:Sum_CoreCount >=1 [strategy=DESCENDING:price]");
+
+        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu3(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCase003_MultiCategoryStrategies() {
+        inferRecommendModule(
+                "cpu:Sum_CoreCount >=1 [strategy=ASCENDING:price]",
+                "disk:Sum_Quantity >=1 [strategy=DESCENDING:price]");
+
+        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu2(Q:1,H:0,S:1),disk1(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCase004_CpuAscendingByDynamicAttribute() {
+        inferRecommendModule("cpu:Sum_CoreCount >=1 [strategy=ASCENDING:CoreCount]");
+
+        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu1(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
+    }
+
+    @Test
+    public void testCase005_CpuDescendingByDynamicAttribute() {
+        inferRecommendModule("cpu:Sum_CoreCount >=1 [strategy=DESCENDING:CoreCount]");
+
+        assertSoluContain(1, "cpu3(Q:1,H:0,S:1)");
+    }
+}
```

```
package com.jmix.executor.bmodel.attr;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.BaseType;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.ExtendedType;

/**
 * йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬«зҒҮж¶“?
 * зҖ№ж°«з®ҹйҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С„ж•®йҺёдҪәж®‘йҸҒзүҲеөҒз»«иҜІзҖ·
 * YXX --XXйҸ„з—“aseType,YйҸ„з–ҺxtendedType
 *
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
public enum DynamicAttributeType {
    E_INT(0, "ENUM Integer"), // зҖөз‘°з°ІйҚҳзҶёж№ҒйҗЁеҮҰnteger
    E_STRING(1, "ENUM String"),
    E_BOOL(2, "ENUM Boolean"),
    E_FLOAT(3, "ENUM Float"),
    E_DOUBLE(4, "ENUM Double"),
    B_INT(100, "base Integer"),
    B_STRING(101, "base String"),
    B_BOOL(102, "base Boolean"),
    B_FLOAT(103, "base Float"),
    B_DOUBLE(104, "base Double");

    /**
     * BASEйҚҠиӮ©ж®‘з”ҜжҗҒеҷә
     */
    public static final int BASE_VALUE = 100;

    /**
     * йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬е…јзҲЈз’Ү?
     */
    private final int value;

    /**
     * йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҸ„еү§гҒҡйҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    private final String name;

    DynamicAttributeType(int value, String name) {
        this.value = value;
        this.name = name;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬?
     *
     * @return йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬?
     */
    public int getValue() {
        return value;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     *
     * @return йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҚҡе¶ҮРһ
     */
    public String getName() {
        return name;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөв•ҒзқҚз»«иҜІзҖ·
     *
     * @return йҺөв•ҒзқҚз»«иҜІзҖ·
     */
    public ExtendedType getExtendedType() {
        return ExtendedType.fromValue(this.value / BASE_VALUE);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚ©иҷ№о”…з»«иҜІзҖ·
     *
     * @return йҚ©иҷ№о”…з»«иҜІзҖ·
     */
    public BaseType getBaseType() {
        return BaseType.fromValue(this.value % BASE_VALUE);
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒйҸҒжқҝвӮ¬иү°е№ҸйҚҷж §оҮ®жҗҙж—Ӯж®‘йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁ?
     *
     * @param value йҚ”г„ҰвӮ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҸҒжқҝвӮ¬?
     * @return зҖөз‘°з°ІйҗЁеӢ«е§©йҺ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬«зҒҮж¶“жғ§вӮ¬?
     * @throws IllegalArgumentException иӨ°ж’ҙжҡҹйҚҠй—ҙз¬үйҚ–еҪ’еҺӨжө и®із¶Қе®ёиҢ¬з…ЎйҗЁеӢ«е§©йҺ¬дҪёзқҳйҺ¬С…иў«йҚЁе¬«жӨӮйҺ¶ж¶ҳеҡӯ
     */
    public static DynamicAttributeType fromValue(int value) {
        for (DynamicAttributeType type : values()) {
            if (type.value == value) {
                return type;
            }
        }
        throw new IllegalArgumentException("Unknown dynamic attribute type value: " + value);
    }

}
```

```diff
+            case "String" -> E_STRING;
+            case "Boolean" -> E_BOOL;
+            case "Float" -> E_FLOAT;
+            case "Double" -> E_DOUBLE;
```

```
@Data

    /**

     */
    private ModuleType type = ModuleType.GENERAL;

    /**
     * з» жҘҒзЎ¶йҚ’и·әжҗ§йҺ»еҝҡе Әж·Үв„ғдј…
     */
    private ModuleAlgArtifact alg;

    @JsonIgnore
    private Map<String, Object> errorMap = new HashMap<>();

    /**
     * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎеҜ®жӣ ж•ӨйҚҸеҙҮйғҙйҚҘ?

     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Module clone() {
        Module to = new Module();
        // з’ӢеҶӘж•Өйҗ–еүҒиў«йҗЁеҲўloneйҸӮи§„зЎ¶
        super.clone(to);
        // жҫ¶е¶…еҹ—PartCategoryйҗ—и§„ж№ҒйҗЁеӢ«зқҳйҺ¬?
        to.setId(this.getId());
        to.setVersion(this.getVersion());
        to.setPackageName(this.getPackageName());
        to.setType(this.getType());
        to.setAlg(this.getAlg());
        to.setErrorMap(this.errorMap);
        return to;
    }

    /**
     * йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁжҹҹеЁүжӣӘзҙқеҜӨиҷ№зҸӣйҸ„зҠІзҡ йҚҸеҙҮйғҙйҺ»ж„¬еҙҢйҸҒе ўе·ј
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public void init() {
        initShortCode();
        initRefRelationGraph();
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮзјӮж «в–јзҖөзЎ…и–„йҗӯо…қе”¬йҗ®дҪёоҳ¬и№ҮжЁәз¶Қ
     * 
     * @return зјӮж «в–јзҖөзЎ…и–„йҗӯо…қе”¬йҗ®дҪёз“§з»—пёҝиҰҶ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String getProgObjShortCodeMemo() {
        // 2йҠҶд№»hortCodes(P1:Size, P2:Color,PT1:part1,PT2:part2)
        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder();
        sb.append("ProgObjs(");
        getProgObjShortCodeMemo(this, sb);
        for (PartCategory partCategory : this.getPartCategorys()) {
            getProgObjShortCodeMemo(partCategory, sb);
            sb.append(",");
        }
        sb.append(")");
        return sb.toString();
    }

    public String getProgObjShortCodeMemo(ModuleBase moduleBase, StringBuilder sb) {
        // 2йҠҶд№»hortCodes(P1:Size, P2:Color,PT1:part1,PT2:part2)
        for (Para para : moduleBase.getParas()) {
            sb.append(para.getShortCode()).append(":").append(para.getCode()).append(",");
        }
        for (IPart part : moduleBase.getAtomicParts()) {
            sb.append(part.getShortCode()).append(":").append(part.getCode()).append(",");
        }
        return sb.toString();
    }

    /**

        }
```

```
package com.jmix.executor.impl.util;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.ModuleBase;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartCategory;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.PartUtils;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonTypeInfo;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.SerializationFeature;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;

/**
 * Moduleе®ёгғҘеҸҝз»«?
 * йҺ»ж„Әз·өModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„йҗЁеҮ§SONжҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж §жӢ°йҚҷе¶…з°ӯйҚ’жҘҖеҜІйҚ”зҶ»е…ҳ
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
@Slf4j
public final class ModuleUtils {
    private static final ObjectMapper OBJECT_MAPPER = new ObjectMapper();

    static {
        // й–°е¶Үз–ҶObjectMapper
        OBJECT_MAPPER.enable(SerializationFeature.INDENT_OUTPUT); // зјҮеәЎеҜІжқҲж’іеҡӯ
        OBJECT_MAPPER.disable(SerializationFeature.FAIL_ON_EMPTY_BEANS); // йҚҸдҪҪоҶҸз»ҢзҜүeanжҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–?

        // й–°е¶Үз–Ҷз»«иҜІзҖ·ж·Үв„ғдј…й”ӣж°«еЁҮйҗўвү’ROPERTYиӨ°гҲ зҙЎйҺје“„з”«@type
        OBJECT_MAPPER.activateDefaultTyping(
                OBJECT_MAPPER.getPolymorphicTypeValidator(),
                ObjectMapper.DefaultTyping.NON_FINAL,
                JsonTypeInfo.As.PROPERTY);
    }

    /**
     * з»үдҪ№ж№ҒйҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІж«’й”ӣеІ„ж§»е§қгҲ дјҗйҚҸйЈҺиў«зҗҡоӮўз–„жёҡе¬ӘеҜІ
     */
    private ModuleUtils() {
        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Utility class cannot be instantiated");
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе“…oduleзҖөзЎ…и–„жҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж ҰиҙҹJSONйҸӮеӣҰж¬ў
     * 
     * @param module       ModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @param jsonFileName JSONйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚҡе¶ҸзҙҷйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲз’әоҲҡз·һй”ӣ?
     * @throws IOException жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҺҝе¶„з¶”жҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұ
     */
    public static void toJsonFile(Module module, String jsonFileName) throws IOException {
        log.info("Serializing Module to JSON file: {}", jsonFileName);

        // зәӯоҶ»з№ҡйҗ©оҶјз¶ҚзҖӣжЁәж№Ә
        Path path = Paths.get(jsonFileName);
        Path parentDir = path.getParent();
        if (parentDir != null && !Files.exists(parentDir)) {
            Files.createDirectories(parentDir);
        }

        // жҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж ҰиҙҹJSONйҸӮеӣҰж¬ў
        OBJECT_MAPPER.writeValue(new File(jsonFileName), module);

        log.info("Successfully serialized Module to JSON file: {}", jsonFileName);
    }

    /**
     * жө е¶«SONйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚҷе¶…з°ӯйҚ’жҘҖеҜІж¶“зҜ—oduleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @param jsonFileName JSONйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҚҡе¶ҸзҙҷйҚ–е‘ӯжғҲз’әоҲҡз·һй”ӣ?
     * @return ModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @throws IOException жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҸӮеӣҰж¬ўйҺҝе¶„з¶”жҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұ
     */
    public static Module fromJsonFile(String jsonFileName) throws IOException {
        log.info("Deserializing Module from JSON file: {}", jsonFileName);

        // еҰ«вӮ¬йҸҢгғҰжһғжө иҲөж§ёйҚҡп№Җз“ЁйҚҰ?
        File file = new File(jsonFileName);
        if (!file.exists()) {
            log.error("JSON file not found: {}", jsonFileName);
            throw new IOException("JSON file not found: " + jsonFileName);
        }

        // йҚҷе¶…з°ӯйҚ’жҘҖеҜІ
        Module module = OBJECT_MAPPER.readValue(file, Module.class);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁДҒйҚ§?
        module.init();

        log.info("Successfully deserialized Module from JSON file: {}", jsonFileName);
        return module;
    }

    /**
     * зҒҸе“…oduleзҖөзЎ…и–„жҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж ҰиҙҹJSONзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“?
     * 
     * @param module ModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @return JSONзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“?
     * @throws IOException жҝЎеӮӣзҒүжҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж §гҒ‘з’җ?
     */
    public static String toJsonString(Module module) throws IOException {
        log.info("Serializing Module to JSON string");
        return OBJECT_MAPPER.writeValueAsString(module);
    }

    /**
     * жө е¶«SONзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“жҸ’ејҪжҗҙеҝ“еһӘйҚ–ж ҰиҙҹModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @param jsonString JSONзҖӣжҘғоғҒж¶“?
     * @return ModuleзҖөзЎ…и–„
     * @throws IOException жҝЎеӮӣзҒүйҚҷе¶…з°ӯйҚ’жҘҖеҜІжҫ¶иҫ«и§Ұ
     */
    public static Module fromJsonString(String jsonString) throws IOException {
        log.info("Deserializing Module from JSON string");
        Module module = OBJECT_MAPPER.readValue(jsonString, Module.class);
        module.init();
        return module;
```

```
package com.jmix.executor;

import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.Module;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.ModuleAlgArtifact;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.util.CommHelper;
import com.jmix.executor.impl.util.ModuleUtils;
import com.jmix.executor.model.ConstraintConfig;
import com.jmix.executor.model.InferParasReq;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ModuleInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.ParaInst;
import com.jmix.executor.cmodel.PartInst;
import com.jmix.executor.model.Result;

import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;

import java.io.File;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.util.List;

@Slf4j
public class ExecutorSampleTest {
    @Test
    public void helloSample() throws IOException {
        // HelloйҗЁеӢ¬ДҒйҚЁе¬ӯоҮ©йҸ„еәҜзҙқз’ҮпёҫзІҸз‘ҷ?cp-Hello-123-sources.jar
        String moduleCode = "Hello";
        long moduleId = 123L;
        // йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ1й”ӣжӯқolor: "Red-1", "Black-2", "White-3"
        // йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ2й”ӣ?Small-10", "Medium-20", "Big-30"
        // й–®г„Өж¬ў1й”ӣжӯөShirt11
        // з» жҘҒзЎ¶й”ӣе ўе®ійҸү?:
        // if(colorVar.value ==Red && sizeVar.value == Small ) {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 1;
        // }
        // else {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 3
        // }

        // йҸҖеү§з•»еЁүжӣ ж®‘йҸҚзЎ…зҹҫеҜ°еӢ¶зҙ°\src\test\resources\algroot
        String rootPath = CommHelper.getTestResourcePath() + File.separator + "algroot";
        String moduleDirPath = rootPath + File.separator
                + String.format(ModuleAlgArtifact.MODULE_DIR_PATTERN, moduleCode, moduleId);
        String moduleJsonFile = String.format(ModuleAlgArtifact.BASE_JSON_PATTERN, moduleCode, moduleId);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж ЁеўҪзҗӣеұҪж«’
        ConstraintConfig config = new ConstraintConfig();
        config.setRootFilePath(rootPath);
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.init(config);

        // йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–жңҡoduleйҸҒзүҲеөҒ
        Module module = ModuleUtils.fromJsonFile(moduleDirPath + File.separator + moduleJsonFile);
        ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.addModule(moduleId, module);

        // йҺәг„§жӮҠйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹ inferParas("tShirt11", 1);
        InferParasReq req = new InferParasReq();
        req.setModuleId(moduleId);
        req.setMainPartInst(new PartInst("tShirt11", 1));
        Result<List<ModuleInst>> result = ModuleConstraintExecutor.INST.inferParas(req);

        // зјҒж’ҙзҒүжҫ¶еӢӯжӮҠ
        log.info("result: {}", result);
        ModuleInst solution = result.getData().get(0);
        ParaInst colorInst = solution.getParas().get(0);
        ParaInst sizeInst = solution.getParas().get(1);
        assertEquals(colorInst.getValue(), "1"); // "Red"
        assertEquals(sizeInst.getValue(), "10"); // "Small"
    }

}
```

```
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.base.Programmable;

import com.google.ortools.sat.CpSolverSolutionCallback;

/**
 * й–«ж°ұж•ӨйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҚ–е‘°о—ҠйҚЈоҹ’зҙқзјҒжҲқз•ҫйҚ’жқҝеҪІзјӮж «в–јеҰҜвҖізҖ·зҖөзЎ…и–„
 * йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠеҪүй–Іеҝ•иў«йҚЁе¬¬ж®‘йҚ©иҷ№иў«
 *

 * @since 2025-09-22
 */
public abstract class Var<T extends Programmable> implements Programmable {
    /**
     * йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected T base;

    /**
     * жҰӣжЁҝо…»йҸӢеӢҜвӮ¬зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     */
    protected Var() {
    }

    /**
     * з”Ҝп№ҖзҶҖзәӯвӮ¬зҖөзЎ…и–„йҗЁеӢ¬зҖҜй–«зҠІеҡұйҸҒ?
     * 
     * @param base йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    protected Var(T base) {
        this.base = base;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @return йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    public T getBase() {
        return base;
    }

    /**
     * з’Ғеү§з–ҶйҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     * 
     * @param base йҚ©иҷ№о”…зҖөзЎ…и–„
     */
    public void setBase(T base) {
        this.base = base;
    }

    @Override
    public String getCode() {
        return base != null ? base.getCode() : null;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷж©ҖеҷәйҗЁеӢ«з“§з»—пёҝиҰҶзҗӣг„§гҒҡ

     */
    public String getVarString(CpSolverSolutionCallback solutionCallback) {

    }

     */
    public String getShortString(CpSolverSolutionCallback solutionCallback) {
        return "";

}
```

```
     * @return йҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚзҖөзЎ…и–„й”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»Җз¬үзҖӣжЁәж№ӘйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘжҝ·ptional.empty()
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Optional<DynamicAttributerOption> getOption(String optionCode) {
        if (optionCodeMap.size() != super.getOptions().size()) {
            optionCodeMap.clear();
            super.getOptions().forEach(option -> optionCodeMap.put(option.getCode(), option));
        }
        DynamicAttributerOption option = optionCodeMap.get(optionCode);
        return option == null ? Optional.empty() : Optional.of(option);
    }

    /**
     * йҸҚи§„еөҒй–«еӨҗгҖҚзјӮж «зҲңidй‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҚҷеӮӣжҡҹй–«еӨҗгҖҚ
     *

     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Optional<DynamicAttributerOption> getOption(Integer optionCodeId) {
        if (optionCodeIdMap.size() != super.getOptions().size()) {
            optionCodeIdMap.clear();
            super.getOptions().forEach(option -> optionCodeIdMap.put(option.getCodeId(), option));
        }
        DynamicAttributerOption option = optionCodeIdMap.get(optionCodeId);
        return option == null ? Optional.empty() : Optional.of(option);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеҮҰDйҸҒжү®зІҚ
     *
     * @return й–«еӨҗгҖҚIDйҸҒжү®зІҚ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public long[] getOptionIds() {
        List<DynamicAttributerOption> options = super.getOptions();
        if (options == null || options.isEmpty()) {
            return new long[0];
        }
        long[] ids = new long[options.size()];
        for (int i = 0; i < options.size(); i++) {
            ids[i] = options.get(i).getCodeId();
        }
        return ids;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗвӮ¬еӨҗгҖҚйҗЁеӢӯзҙӘйҗ®дҪ№жҡҹзјҒ?
     *
     * @return й–«еӨҗгҖҚзјӮж «зҲңйҸҒжү®зІҚ
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public String[] getOptionCodes() {
        List<DynamicAttributerOption> options = super.getOptions();
        if (options == null || options.isEmpty()) {
            return new String[0];
        }
        String[] codes = new String[options.size()];
        for (int i = 0; i < options.size(); i++) {
            codes[i] = options.get(i).getCode();
        }
        return codes;
    }
```

```
package com.jmix.scenario.hello;

import com.jmix.coretest.ConstraintAlgImplTestBase;
import com.jmix.executor.imodel.anno.CodeRuleAnno;
import com.jmix.executor.imodel.anno.ModuleAnno;
import com.jmix.executor.imodel.anno.ParaAnno;
import com.jmix.executor.imodel.anno.PartAnno;

import com.google.ortools.sat.BoolVar;
import com.google.ortools.sat.Literal;

/**
 * HelloеҰҜвҖіжҪЎз»ҫпёҪжҪ«з» жҘҒзЎ¶
 * 
 * @since 2025-09-23
 */
@ModuleAnno(id = 123L)
public class HelloConstraint extends ConstraintAlgImplTestBase {

    @ParaAnno(defaultValue = "Red", options = { "Red:1", "Black:2", "White:3" })
    private ParaVar colorVar;

    @ParaAnno(defaultValue = "Small", options = { "Small", "Medium", "Big" })
    private ParaVar sizeVar;

    @PartAnno(price = 100L)
    private PartVar tShirt11Var;

    /**
     * йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҸҒдјҙеҷәз‘ҷеӢ«еһҜй”ӣж°¬зҶҖжөңеәЁо–Ғй‘№жҸ’жӢ°зҒҸе“„оҮӯйҗЁеӢҜе„ҙжө иҲөжҡҹй–ІеҝҡоқүйҚ’?
     * з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜйҚҗе‘ӯоҶҗй”ӣж°¬оӣ§йҸӢж»Ҳо–Ғй‘№жҹҘвӮ¬еӨӢе«Ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝжҳӮзҖөжҗҒвӮ¬еӨӢе«ЁзҒҸеҝ“еҪҝй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?й”ӣж¶ҳжғҒйҚ’ж¬Һиҙҹ3
     */
    @CodeRuleAnno()
    public void addConstraintRule2() {

        // "Red-10", "Black-20", "White-30"
        // "Small-10", "Medium-20", "Big-30"
        // if(colorVar.value ==Red && sizeVar.value == Small ) {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 1;
        // }
        // else {
        // tShirt11Var.qty = 3
        // }

        // йҚ’ж¶ҳзј“йҸүвҖІж¬ўйҚҷж©Җеҷәй”ӣж°¶о–Ғй‘№еҸүж§ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝжҳӮзҖөе‘Ҡж§ёзҒҸеҝ“еҪҝ
        BoolVar redAndSmall = newBoolVar("rule2_redAndSmall");

        // зҖ№зӮөе№ҮйҸүвҖІж¬ўй–«жҳҸз·«й”ӣжӯіedAndSmall = (Color == Red) AND (Size == Small)
        model.addBoolAnd(new Literal[] {
                this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar(),
                this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar()
        }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүж¶“е¶Ҷж§ёз»ҫгҲЈеЈҠж¶“ж–ҝзҡ¬йҚҷйЈҺж®‘зјҒеӢ«жӮҺй”ӣеұҪеһҜredAndSmallж¶“зҜәalse
        model.addBoolOr(new Literal[] {
                this.colorVar.getParaOptionByCode("Red").getIsSelectedVar().not(),
                this.sizeVar.getParaOptionByCode("Small").getIsSelectedVar().not()
        }).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());

        // йҸҚи§„еөҒйҸүвҖІж¬ўз’Ғеү§з–ҶTShirt11йҗЁеӢ¬жҡҹй–І?
        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүredAndSmallж¶“з°Қrueй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?
        model.addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.qty, 1).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall);

        // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүredAndSmallж¶“зҜәalseй”ӣеұҪеһҜTShirt11йҸҒдјҙеҷәж¶“?
        model.addEquality(this.tShirt11Var.qty, 3).onlyEnforceIf(redAndSmall.not());
    }
}
```

```
package com.jmix.executor.bmodel;

import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.CalcStage;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.Rule;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.logic.RuleTypeConstants;
import com.jmix.executor.bmodel.para.Para;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonIgnore;

import lombok.Data;
import lombok.EqualsAndHashCode;
import lombok.extern.slf4j.Slf4j;

import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Optional;

/**
 * еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҚ©иҷ№иў«
 * йҚ–е‘ӯжғҲPartйҚңеӯӯartCategoryйҗ©зЁҝеҸ§йҗЁеӢ«еҸ•йҚҸеҚһз“§еЁҲйқӣжӢ°йҸӮи§„зЎ¶
 * PartCategoryйҚңеӯ§oduleйҗЁеӢ«еҸ•йҚҸеҚһзҶҖз»«?
 * 
 * @since 2025-01-XX
 */
@Data
@EqualsAndHashCode(callSuper = true)
@Slf4j
public class ModuleBase extends Onto {

    /**
     * йҚҳзҶ·з“ҷй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    protected List<Part> atomicParts = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«йҚ’жҘ„гҖғ
     */
    protected List<PartCategory> partCategorys = new ArrayList<>();

    /**
     * й–®г„Өж¬ўйҸ„зҠІзҡ зҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    protected Map<String, Part> atomicPartMap = new HashMap<>();

    /**
     * йҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–ж «з…ӯжө пҪҮзҲң
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public void initShortCode() {
        initShortCode(1);
    }

    @JsonIgnore
    public int initShortCode(int startIndex) {
        int index = super.initShortCode(startIndex);
        for (Part part : atomicParts) {
            if (part.getCode().length() <= 4) { // жҝЎеӮӣзҒүзјӮж «зҲңй—Җеһ®е®ізҒҸеҝҺз°¬з»ӣеӨүз°¬3й”ӣеұҪеһҜйҗ©еӯҳеёҙжөЈи·Ёж•ӨзјӮж «зҲң
                part.setShortCode(part.getCode());
            } else {
                part.setShortCode(Part.SHORT_CODE_PREFIX + index);
                index++;
            }
        }
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            index = partCategory.initShortCode(index);
        }
        return index;
    }

    /**
     * жө еәўДҒйҚ§жӨҫи…‘йҸҢгғҰеЈҳй–®г„Өж¬ўйҚ’е—ҷиў«
     *
     * @param categoryCode йҚ’е—ҷиў«жө пҪҮзҲң
     * @return йҺөжғ§еҹҢйҗЁеҮұartCategoryй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»„ж№ӯйҺөжғ§еҹҢйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘзҖ—ull
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public PartCategory getPartCategory(String categoryCode) {
        PartCategory result = null;
        // йҸҚи§„еөҒpartCategorysйҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–жқҷartCategoryMap
        for (PartCategory pc : this.partCategorys) {
            result = getPartCategory(pc, categoryCode);
            if (null != result) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    private PartCategory getPartCategory(PartCategory category, String categoryCode) {
        if (category.getCode().equals(categoryCode)) {
            return category;
        }
        PartCategory result = null;
        // йҸҚи§„еөҒpartCategorysйҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–жқҷartCategoryMap
        for (PartCategory pc : category.getPartCategorys()) {
            result = getPartCategory(pc, categoryCode);
            if (null != result) {
                return result;
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    /**
     * жө еәўДҒйҚ§жӨҫи…‘йҸҢгғҰеЈҳй–®г„Өж¬ў
     * 
     * @param partCode й–®г„Өж¬ўжө пҪҮзҲң
     * @return йҺөжғ§еҹҢйҗЁеҮұartй”ӣеұҪоӣ§йҸӢж»„ж№ӯйҺөжғ§еҹҢйҚ’ж¬’з№‘йҚҘзҖ—ull
     * @return
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public Part getAtomicPart(String partCode) {
        if (atomicPartMap == null || atomicPartMap.isEmpty()) {
            // йҸҚи§„еөҒpartsйҚ’жҝҶоқҗйҚ–жқҷartMap
            for (Part part : atomicParts) {
                atomicPartMap.put(part.getCode(), part);
            }
        }
        return atomicPartMap.get(partCode);
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҗе„ҙжө ?
     * 
     * @return
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<IPart> getAllParts() {
        List<IPart> allParts = new ArrayList<>();
        allParts.addAll(atomicParts);
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            allParts.add(partCategory);
            allParts.addAll(partCategory.getAllParts());
        }
        return allParts;
    }

    /**
     * й‘ҫеі°еҪҮйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬ҸеһӘзҗӣоҹ’зҙҷйҚ–е‘®е«ӯзҖӣж„¬еһҺз»«и®іи…‘йҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’ж¬ҷзҙҡ
     * й–«жҺ‘з¶ҠйҸҖе •жіҰйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷйҚ’е—ҷиў«ж¶“о… ж®‘з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ

     * @return йҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҺоқүйҚ’ж¬ҸеһӘзҗӣ?
     */
    @JsonIgnore
    public List<Rule> getAllRules() {
        List<Rule> allRules = new ArrayList<>();
        // еЁЈиҜІе§һиӨ°ж’іеў еҰҜвҖіжҪЎйҗЁеӢ®оқүйҚ’?
        List<Rule> rules = getRules();
        if (rules != null) {
            allRules.addAll(rules);
        }
        // й–«жҺ‘з¶ҠйҸҖе •жіҰйҺөвӮ¬йҸҲеӨҠз“ҷйҚ’е—ҷиў«ж¶“о… ж®‘з‘ҷеӢ«еһҜ
        for (PartCategory partCategory : partCategorys) {
            allRules.addAll(partCategory.getAllRules());
        }
        return allRules;
    }
```
